title: EKS Asset Setup Schema — Registry & Column Normalization
description: Declares the asset_type_registry (type→fragment mapping including conditional_fragments for zero-code extensibility) and column normalization rules for ingesting the project Excel datadrop.

conditional_fragment_rule.description: A rule that applies a fragment only when a specified field value matches a set of values

when.description: Field name in item_core to evaluate

in.description: List of values that trigger the fragment

relationship_triggers.description: Maps asset config fields to graph relationship types for auto-creating edges at ingest

document_triggers.description: Maps document registry fields to graph relationship types for doc-asset linking at ingest

asset_type_registry.description: Maps each AT_ tag_type to its fragment list and optional conditional fragment rules. Adding a new asset type requires only a new entry here — no code changes.

conditional_fragments.description: Optional rules to include additional fragments based on field values at ingest time

ontology_class_map.description: Maps AT_ tag types to ontology class names for dynamic A-Box creation.

fragment_category_registry.description: Categorizes each fragment as functional (slot/design) or physical (equipment instance) per ISO 15926 Part 2.

column_normalization.description: Maps sheet-specific column names to canonical field names per sheet
